% jianpu-ly.py
title=音乐的瞬间
6=E
2/4

0 - | 0 q1 s1 s2 | 3 - | q1 s1 s2 q1 q3 |
6 6 | q- s6 s#6 q6 q6 | q- s2' s0 6 | s3 s2 s1 s2 s3 s4 s3 s#5 |
6 - | 3 - | s- s4 s5 s4 q4 s3 s0 | q2 q2 s3 s2 s1 s2 |
- 3 | 1' - | s7 s6 s#5 s6 6 | s- s5 5 q5 |
- - | 0 5 | q1' s1' s7 q6 s5 s4 | 3 - |
q1' s1' s7 q6 s5 s4 | 3 - | s5 s4 s5 s4 q4 s3 s2 | q1 q1 s1 s2 s3 s2 |
1 - | s- s1 s2 q1 q7, s0 | 3 - | q1 s1 s2 q1 q3 |
1 7, | - q7, s1 s7, | q6 s- s2' s0 q6. | s3 s2 s1 s2 s3 s4 s3 s#5 |
6 - | q7 s7 s1' q7 q7 | q2' 1' s7 s6 | q3 s3 s#4 q3 q#5 |
6 - | q7 s7 s1' q7 q7 | q2' 1' s7 s6 | q4 s3 s#4 q4 q#4 |
q3 s3 s#4 q3 q#4 | q3 s3 s#4 q3 q#5 | 6 - | 2 - |
q3, s3, s4, q3, q#4,, | q3 s3 s#4 q3 q#1 | 2 - | q- s2 s3 q2 q#5, |
6, 6, | 6, 6, | - - |
